# Turnover Features Experiment

*Generated by `sportslab turnover-experiment` (v2.0.0, 2026-06-23)*

## Model Variants

| Label | Features | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| incumbent | 4 feats | Incumbent (qb_changed + rolling_mov_3) |
| to_net_3 | 7 feats | + rolling TO net (3-game) |
| to_net_5 | 7 feats | + rolling TO net (5-game) |
| to_net_both | 10 feats | + rolling TO net (3+5 game) |
| to_all | 10 feats | + all turnover features |

## Rolling-Origin Validation (3 folds: 2022, 2023, 2024)

| Model | Avg Val LL | Fold1 | Fold2 | Fold3 |
|-------|-----------|-------|-------|-------|
| incumbent | 0.6334 | 0.6413 | 0.6573 | 0.6016 |
| to_net_3 | 0.6370 (+0.0036) | 0.6547 | 0.6556 | 0.6007 |
| to_net_5 | 0.6352 (+0.0018) | 0.6506 | 0.6550 | 0.6001 |
| to_net_both | 0.6365 (+0.0031) | 0.6537 | 0.6557 | 0.6001 |
| to_all | 0.6365 (+0.0031) | 0.6537 | 0.6557 | 0.6001 |

## Fitted-Once (Holdout: 2025)

| Model | Holdout LL | Δ vs Incumbent |
|-------|-----------|----------------|
| incumbent | 0.6262 | — |
| to_net_3 | 0.6230 | -0.0032 |
| to_net_5 | 0.6282 | +0.0020 |
| to_net_both | 0.6301 | +0.0039 |
| to_all | 0.6301 | +0.0039 |

## Promotion Check

| to_net_3 | val ✗ | hold ✓ | Rejected |
| to_net_5 | val ✗ | hold ✗ | Rejected |
| to_net_both | val ✗ | hold ✗ | Rejected |
| to_all | val ✗ | hold ✗ | Rejected |

**Mixed results — wins one metric but not both.**

---
*Incumbent: v2.0.0, 0.6262 holdout LL.*
